name: Brandied Raspberry Sauce
recipeInstructions:
Note: 3 cups fresh raspberries can be used in place of frozen raspberries.
Combine raspberries and sugar in a medium saucepan. Dissolve the cornstarch in the brandy in a small bowl. Stir the cornstarch mixture into the raspberries until well blended. Cook over medium heat, stirring frequently, until the sauce thickens and bubbles, about 5 minutes. Do not overcook. Cool to room temperature. Store in a tightly covered container.
